packs.name: sentinella_stealers
packs.description: Detection rules for Discord token theft, browser credential harvesting, crypto wallet theft, and webhook-based exfiltration.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_scripts
packs.description: Detection rules for PowerShell abuse, encoded commands, AMSI bypass, Defender tampering, certutil abuse, and JavaScript obfuscation.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_deception
packs.description: Detection rules for PyInstaller abuse, Node.js SEA, persistence mechanisms, fake documents, weaponized Electron apps, and cryptominers.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_github_stealers
packs.description: Detection rules for fake game mods, updaters, and cracked software distributed via GitHub that are actually information stealers. Targets PyInstaller/Pyarmor-packed stealers, .NET stealers, and multi-browser credential harvesters with webhook exfiltration.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_lolbins
packs.description: Detection rules for Living-Off-The-Land binary abuse: mshta, regsvr32 Squiblydoo, WMIC process creation, rundll32 JavaScript, CMSTP INF execution, and forfiles abuse.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_documents
packs.description: Detection rules for malicious PDFs (JavaScript exploits, embedded PE), Office macros with auto-execution and download cradles, weaponized LNK shortcuts, and ISO/IMG droppers.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_persistence
packs.description: Detection rules for scheduled task persistence, WMI event subscriptions, security tool termination, environment discovery, and UAC bypass techniques (fodhelper, eventvwr).
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_ransomware
packs.description: Detection rules for ransomware encryption loops, shadow copy deletion, ransom note indicators, and file extension modification patterns.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_dotnet_obfuscation
packs.description: Detection rules for ConfuserEx/.NET Reactor obfuscation, .NET reflection loading, .NET process injection, .NET credential stealers, and heavy obfuscation indicators.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_droppers
packs.description: Detection rules for AutoIt droppers, HTA payloads, self-extracting archives with scripts, temp directory dropper patterns, and embedded ZIP payloads.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_powershell_advanced
packs.description: Deep detection of PowerShell cradle variants, AMSI patch bytes, ETW bypass, base64+compression chains, scheduled task persistence, and rundll32 proxy execution.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_browser_hijack
packs.description: Detection rules for browser extension sideloading, proxy injection, root certificate installation, and multi-browser history exfiltration.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_credential_tools
packs.description: Detection rules for Mimikatz, LaZagne, DPAPI extraction, clipboard stealers, and keylogger indicators.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_suspicious_updaters
packs.description: Detection rules for fake updaters with download+execute, small unsigned updaters, DLL sideloading, and trojanized installers with persistence.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_c2_indicators
packs.description: Detection rules for Pastebin C2 resolvers, Telegram bot exfiltration, Discord webhook stealer chains, Steam dead-drop resolvers, and raw socket beaconing.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_stealer_exfil
packs.description: Detection rules for ZIP-and-send exfiltration chains, screenshot capture stealers, WiFi password harvesting, system fingerprinting, and Telegram session theft.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_evasion_techniques
packs.description: Detection rules for sandbox/VM detection, delayed execution, ntdll unhooking, PPID spoofing, timestomping, and event log tampering.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_crypto_threats
packs.description: Detection rules for multi-wallet file theft, clipboard address replacement, browser extension wallet theft, and seed phrase hunting.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_backdoor_rat
packs.description: Detection rules for remote shells, persistent backdoors with network beaconing, and reverse-connection RATs.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_worm_propagation
packs.description: Detection rules for autorun.inf creation, removable drive self-copying, and network share spreading.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_generic_trojan
packs.description: Detection rules for download-execute chains, self-copy persistence, system discovery, hidden window execution, mutex enforcement, and spyware combos.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_packed_obfuscated
packs.description: Detection rules for Nuitka-compiled Python, high-entropy minimal-import PE files, batch-to-EXE compilers, and Go-based stealers.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_generic_spyware
packs.description: Detection rules for webcam capture, audio recording, and geolocation tracking combined with data collection.
packs.author: Sentinella
